headline: Are Options Traders Betting on a Big Move in Kimberly-Clark Stock?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to KMB stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Kimberly-Clark taps former Walgreens tech chief as CIO
summary: Francesco Tinto, a digital transformation specialist, joined the company Monday to lead the IT and global business services units.
